question: Is Novo Nordisk's revenue decline (-7.6% YoY) temporary or structural?

findings.claim: NVO FY2025 total sales were DKK 309,064 million, up 6% in DKK and 10% at CER — a sharp deceleration from 25%+ growth in FY2024
findings.data: Full-year 2025 net sales DKK 309,064 million (approx USD 46.8B), +6% DKK / +10% CER. FY2024 net sales were DKK 290.4B (+26% DKK). Growth halved year-over-year. The company cut its full-year guidance three times during 2025.

findings.claim: Quarterly revenue growth decelerated from +19% in Q1 2025 to +5.2% in Q3 2025, with Q4 roughly flat
findings.data: Q1 2025: DKK 78,087M (+19% DKK / +18% CER). Q2 2025: DKK 76,813M (implied, +16% DKK for H1). Q3 2025: DKK 74,980M (+5.2%). Q4 2025: DKK 79,100M (slightly beat consensus of DKK 77,800M). Ozempic Q4: DKK 31,800M (+1% CER). Wegovy Q4: DKK 21,900M (+17% CER). Operating profit Q4: DKK 31,700M (-14% YoY).

findings.claim: Revenue growth peaked in Q1 2024 at ~36% CER and has decelerated for 7 consecutive quarters
findings.data: Growth trajectory (CER): Q1 2024 ~36% → Q2 2024 ~25% → Q3 2024 ~21% → Q4 2024 ~18% → Q1 2025 +18% → Q2 2025 ~+14% → Q3 2025 +5% → Q4 2025 ~flat. The deceleration accelerated sharply in H2 2025 as Eli Lilly gained market share and pricing pressures intensified.

findings.claim: Ozempic full-year 2025 sales DKK 127,089M (+6% DKK / +10% CER); Wegovy FY2025 obesity care ~DKK 82B (+31%); Rybelsus DKK 22,093M (-5% DKK)
findings.data: Product breakdown FY2025: Ozempic DKK 127,089M. Rybelsus DKK 22,093M. Total GLP-1 diabetes DKK 152,202M (+2% DKK / +6% CER). Obesity care (Wegovy+Saxenda) ~DKK 82,000M (+31%). Wegovy alone was the growth driver; Saxenda is declining. International Wegovy sales reached DKK 28B (+134%).
